post.summary: Initial onboarding (creates tenant, admin user, membership)

get.summary: List attribute definitions for a category

post.summary: Set active branch for current membership

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Optional. If provided, filters by active status.

409.description: Attribute key already exists for this category

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional category id (26 chars) to filter by.

409.description: Attribute key already exists for this category

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Import mode. Supported: create, update, upsert

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated list of columns to include. Can be repeated.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Export format. Supported: xlsx, csv (default: xlsx)

200.description: Export file. Response is a binary stream with content-disposition header.

bearer.description: Send a valid JWT access token. This API also accepts the access token via cookie (see cookie auth).

cookie.name: accessToken
cookie.description: Optional. If present, the API will read the access token from this cookie.

branch.description: Optional initial branch to create. If omitted, a default branch may be created.

isVisibleInTable.description: Whether the attribute is visible in product table.

options.description: Options for ENUM attributes. Required when type=ENUM.

attributeDefinitions.description: Optional attribute definitions to create along with the category.

branchId.description: Branch id (26 chars) to set as active for the current membership.

code.description: Optional customer code. Must be unique per tenant when provided.

taxId.description: Tax id / document number (future billing fields).

isActive.description: Soft active flag. Defaults to true.

code.description: Customer code. Send null to clear it.

taxId.description: Tax id / document number. Send null to clear it.

taxIdType.description: Tax id type. Send null to clear it.

vatCondition.description: VAT condition. Send null to clear it.

email.description: Email address. Send null to clear it.

phone.description: Phone number. Send null to clear it.

address.description: Customer address. Send null to clear it.

notes.description: Free text notes. Send null to clear it.

isActive.description: Soft active flag (can be used to reactivate).

branchId.description: Branch id (26 chars) to initialize stock for.

isActive.description: Soft active flag. Defaults to true.

attributes.description: Product custom attributes (key/value). Validated against category definitions.

initialStock.description: Optional initial stock entries to initialize inventories.

isVisibleInTable.description: Whether the attribute is visible in product table.

options.description: Options for ENUM attributes. Required when type=ENUM.

categoryId.description: Move definition to another category (26 chars).

isVisibleInTable.description: Whether the attribute is visible in product table.

options.description: Options for ENUM attributes. Required when type=ENUM.

categoryId.description: Category id (26 chars). Use null to clear.

description.description: Description. Use empty string to clear.

attributes.description: Product custom attributes (key/value). Validated against category definitions.

quantity.description: Quantity delta. Can be negative or positive.

customerId.description: Optional customer id. Must exist in the same tenant and be active (isActive=true).

quantity.description: New quantity. Use 0 to remove the item.

customerId.description: Optional customer id to (re)assign on checkout. Must exist in the same tenant and be active (isActive=true).

previewId.description: Preview id returned by the preview endpoint (26 chars).
